summary: Integrated ADR 0272 on synchronized main release 0.177.75 by verifying the governed restore-readiness ladders and stateful warm-up profiles through an exact-main restore replay on the newest origin/main baseline, recording stage-specific failure evidence for postgres, docker-runtime, and backup guests, and establishing platform version 0.130.51 with restore-fixture cleanup confirmed afterward.

verification.check: Latest origin/main baseline and protected release cut
verification.observed: `git fetch origin --prune` confirmed the newest published `origin/main` baseline had advanced to commit `0ce2684be2bf15c4bdc3363aa61325e304678ced`; the integrated ADR 0272 replay source was commit `2743581df9937505b55bfe84cd26d8666586169d` on top of that head, and the protected release cut then advanced repository version `0.177.74` to `0.177.75` while recording platform version `0.130.51` for this exact-main restore-readiness rollout.

`python3 -m py_compile scripts/restore_verification.py scripts/synthetic_transaction_replay.py scripts/smoke_tests/postgres_smoke.py scripts/smoke_tests/docker_runtime_smoke.py scripts/smoke_tests/backup_vm_smoke.py config/windmill/scripts/restore-verification.py` passed; `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml pytest tests/test_restore_verification.py tests/test_restore_verification_windmill.py tests/test_synthetic_transaction_replay.py -q` returned `17 passed`; `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/validate_repository_data_models.py --validate` passed; `./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards` and `./scripts/validate_repo.sh generated-docs` passed; `uv run --with pyyaml python scripts/canonical_truth.py --check`, `uvx --from pyyaml python scripts/generate_status_docs.py --check`, `uv run --with pyyaml python scripts/generate_diagrams.py --check`, `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/platform_manifest.py --check`, `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/live_apply_receipts.py --validate`, and `git diff --check` all passed on the final integrated tree.

`uv run --with pyyaml python scripts/restore_verification.py --selection-strategy latest --ssh-timeout-seconds 900 --triggered-by ws-0272-mainline-r2 --actor-id ws-0272-mainline-r2 --print-report-json` completed from the refreshed latest-main worktree and wrote `receipts/restore-verifications/2026-03-29.json`, proving the integrated ladder-aware receipt path on live infrastructure from the newest available mainline.

The resulting restore receipt correctly surfaced target-specific failure stages instead of a single opaque outcome: `postgres-lv3` failed at `restore_completed` because `proxmox-backup-client restore` exited `255`; `docker-runtime-lv3` also failed at `restore_completed` because `pbs-restore` exited `255`; and `backup-lv3` failed at `restore_completed` because no PBS backups were available for selection. The summary recorded `highest_completed_stage_counts: {"not_started": 3}`.

`ssh -i /Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/proxmox_florin_server/.local/ssh/hetzner_llm_agents_ed25519 -o IdentitiesOnly=yes -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=10 -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null ops@100.64.0.1 'sudo qm list | egrep "VMID| 900 | 901 | 902 " || true'` returned only the table header, confirming the temporary restore VMIDs were gone after the replay.

notes: This receipt makes ADR 0272's live status explicit: the production restore-verification workflow now records readiness ladders, warm-up attempts, profile metadata, and synthetic-replay eligibility from the integrated mainline.

The newest exact-main replay did not prove healthy restores for any protected guest; instead, it proved the new semantics are live by preserving exactly where each recovery path stops on the current platform baseline.

Follow-up repair work is still required for the postgres PBS restore failure, the docker-runtime pbs-restore failure, and the missing backup-lv3 snapshot coverage before the restore program itself can be considered healthy.
